title: WhatsApp launches parent managed account feature: How it works, how to use and more
summary: WhatsApp is launching 'parent-managed accounts' for pre-teens, allowing parents to control their children's interactions while ensuring privacy through end-to-end encryption. The setup requires both devices to link accounts, and a Parent PIN secures privacy settings.

title: iQOO Z11x with 7,200 mAh battery and Dimensity 7400 SoC launched in India, price starts at ₹18,999
summary: iQOO has launched the Z11x 5G in India, featuring a 7200mAh battery, dual rear cameras, and a 6.76-inch Full HD+ display. Prices start at ₹18,999, offering models with up to 256GB storage, and the device supports military-grade durability and 4K video recording.

title: Adobe adds AI assistant to Photoshop, upgrades Firefly with new generative tools
summary: Adobe is launching a beta AI assistant for Photoshop on web and mobile, allowing paid users unlimited generations until April 9. The assistant simplifies editing tasks through voice or text commands, while Firefly Image Editor receives updates for improved image manipulation.

title: Google turns Chrome into an AI browser with Gemini support in India — top features, how to use and more
summary: Google is enhancing Chrome with Gemini AI integration. The feature is now available to users in India, Canada, and New Zealand. The AI can be used to summarize content, draft emails, and edit images.&nbsp;

title: Xiaomi 17, Xiaomi 17 Ultra with LEICA camera setup launched in India: Price, specs, launch offers and more
summary: Xiaomi launched the 17 series in India, featuring LTPO 120Hz displays, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 processors, and LEICA camera setup. The Xiaomi 17 starts at ₹89,999, while the Ultra model begins at ₹1,39,999

title: Instagram down? Thousands report issues accessing social media platform, frustrated netizens say ‘whole thing is broken’
summary: Instagram is experiencing access issues, with over 10,000 user reports on Downdetector. The peak of complaints occurred around 8:59 AM India time.

title: Incentives, value addition boost made-in-India laptops
summary: Driven by government incentives, Made in India laptops now account for nearly 30% of domestic sales, up from less than 5% in 2024. Local manufacturers like Dixon and Syrma SGS are aggressively scaling capacity to offset a slowdown in the smartphone sector.

title: Michael Burry claims Nvidia used ‘mafia-like’ tactics to block AMD in Oracle data center deal, calls for antitrust probe
summary: Despite cancelling the planned 600-MW expansion at the Abilene site, Oracle and OpenAI’s broader plan to build 4.5 gigawatts of AI data centre capacity remains on track.

title: iPhone Fold leaks: Expected price, release date, specifications and more
summary: Apple's upcoming foldable iPhone, likely called iPhone Ultra, is likely to launch later this year. The phone could feature a dual rear camera setup and four cameras in total.&nbsp;

title: Rapido's new backer; Blinkit gets funding boost
summary: Aravind Sanka's Rapido has added a new investor to its ongoing $600 million round. This and more in today's ETtech Top 5.

title: Britain to tighten investment screening for water and semiconductor sectors
summary: Britain is strengthening its national security investment screening. New rules will bring water companies under mandatory scrutiny. Advanced artificial intelligence systems will be reviewed. title: Chipmaking tool provider KLA unveils additional $7 billion share buyback and dividend increase
summary: KLA Corp is boosting shareholder returns with a new $7 billion stock buyback and a 21% dividend hike. The chipmaking tool provider also reaffirmed its current quarter forecast. Strong demand for AI infrastructure is driving KLA's growth. Chipmakers are ordering more of KLA's tools for AI processors

title: No chance of renewed Anthropic negotiations: Pentagon CTO
summary: The Pentagon's Chief Technology Officer has shut down talks with AI firm Anthropic. This decision comes after the agency identified Anthropic as a supply-chain risk. The CTO stated there is no chance of an agreement. He cited leaking and bad-faith negotiation as reasons for the breakdown. The leader

summary: Google Maps is getting a big AI upgrade. New features powered by Gemini will help users find places and plan trips. A tool called Ask Maps will offer personalized suggestions. title: UK watchdogs press Meta, TikTok, Snap and YouTube to block children
summary: Britain's regulators are pushing social media giants for tougher age verification. Ofcom and ICO are concerned about children's exposure to harmful content. Platforms like Meta, TikTok, and YouTube must improve age checks by April 30. Regulators warn of significant fines if companies fail to comply

title: Andhra Pradesh govt invites Capgemini to set up IT development centre in Vizag
summary: Andhra Pradesh IT Minister Nara Lokesh invited tech giant Capgemini to set up an IT development centre and a Global Capability Centre in Visakhapatnam. This initiative could generate approximately 20,000 jobs. The minister also encouraged partnerships for emerging technology labs and a quantum verti

title: Accel set to lead $12 million round in AI fintech Oolka
summary: The round comes on the back of a $7 million infusion led by Lightspeed and Z47 last September. The company counts Livspace founder Ramakant Sharma, Meesho’s Vidit Aatrey, and Blackbuck’s Rajesh Yabaji as angel investors.

title: Bumble shares surge as investors swipe right on AI-powered reboot
summary: CEO Whitney Wolfe Herd's push for AI‑driven product revamp comes as Bumble attempts a closely watched turnaround in an online ‌dating industry ⁠grappling ⁠with slower growth and "swiping fatigue" among younger users.
